channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Forget Lego Smart Bricks — this ‘ridiculously wild’ home-built Lego PC is the coolest thing you’ll see today
item.description: A Redditor created a breathtaking gaming PC housed in a custom Lego chassis.

item.title: The FCC Has a Fast Lane for Complaints About Trump’s Media Critics
item.description: Internal emails obtained by WIRED reveal how a conservative legal group with a direct line into FCC chairman Brendan Carr’s office built the case against Jimmy Kimmel and his employees.

item.title: The RAM Crisis Just Royally Screwed Microsoft Surface PCs
item.description: We likely won't see a new Surface PC as cheap as the MacBook Neo anytime soon.

item.title: Jeff Bezos still gets paid an $80,000 salary from Amazon — but also gets $1.6 million for travel and security, and 'requested not to receive additional compensation'
item.description: Jeff Bezos only takes home $81k a year — but don't worry, he's not out of pocket.

item.title: Arnaque sur l’App Store : cette application malveillante a berné Apple et volé des millions
item.description: Une application pirate s'est infiltrée sur l'App Store. Usurpant l'identité de Ledger, elle a permis à des pirates de voler neuf millions de dollars en cryptomonnaies.

item.title: GTA 5 voice actor shuts down rumors that he's playing GTA 6's Carl Hampton but says he would love to play a 'proper villain' in the game
item.description: Jay Klaitz, the voice actor behind Grand Theft Auto 5's heist mastermind Lester Crest, has shut down the rumors that he's playing a character in Grand Theft Auto 6.

item.title: Bose’s noise-crushing QC Ultra Earbuds are nearly 20 percent off right now
item.description: When it comes to the best noise-canceling earbuds, the competition has gotten fierce. Apple, Sony, Samsung, and Google all offer excellent options, though, unsurprisingly, Bose still retains the noise-canceling crown with the latest QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds. Luckily, you can now grab the second-gen earbuds at Amazon and Best Buy for $249 ($50 off), which matches […]...

item.title: Future-proof your privacy on World Quantum Day 2026
item.description: Get a taste of the post-quantum age with encryption technology designed for the next generation of computing power

item.title: Zach Cregger’s ‘Resident Evil’ Looks Way Different Than We Were Expecting
item.description: Austin Abrams stars in what looks to be a more rural, grounded take on the survival horror game series.

item.title: Samsung's new Micro RGB TVs start at $1,600 for a 55-inch model
item.description: Samsung just released its lineup of Micro RGB TVs for 2026, and it includes models that start at 55 inches and go up to 85 inches. These 4K sets feature the company's Micro RGB display technology, which uses thousands of little red, green and blue LEDs to minimize color bleed and enable "expanded color with pinpoint accuracy." The display is assisted by a new AI processor that has been specifically designed to calibrate the picture to bring out all of that gorgeous color. The company says this results in "stunningly sharp images with incredible detail." The processor also assists with motion s...

item.title: Tens of Millions From Texas to Maine in the Path of Severe Storms and Possible Tornadoes
item.description: A large swath of the U.S. is in for some wild weather this week.

item.title: How to watch Liverpool vs PSG: Free Streams, TV Schedule and Preview for Champions League quarter-final second leg
item.description: Here's how to watch Liverpool vs Paris Saint-Germain in the second leg of their Champions League 2025/26 quarter-final at Anfield

item.title: Your Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses don’t have facial recognition yet, and over 70 privacy advocacy organizations want it to stay that way
item.description: Privacy advocates have urged Meta to cancel its rumored controversial Name Tag feature.

item.title: KEF's nouveau Muo is a solid little Bluetooth speaker, but the game's changed since 2016 — and it's no longer top of the pile
item.description: After too long a break, KEF is back in the Bluetooth speaker game. It’s aiming for the upper end of the market though — so does the Muo hit the mark?

item.title: Databricks research shows multi-step agents consistently outperform single-turn RAG when answers span databases and documents
item.description: Data teams building AI agents keep running into the same failure mode. Questions that require joining structured data with unstructured content, sales figures alongside customer reviews or citation counts alongside academic papers, break single-turn RAG systems. New research from Databricks puts a number on that failure gap. The company's AI research team tested a multi-step agentic approach against state-of-the-art single-turn RAG baselines across nine enterprise knowledge tasks, reporting gains of 20% or more on Stanford's STaRK benchmark suite and consistent improvement across Databricks' o...

item.title: L’iPhone n’utilisera sans doute pas Starlink : Apple signe avec Amazon
item.description: Les théories autour d'un iPhone international propulsé par Starlink prennent un coup dans l'aile : Apple et Amazon ont signé un partenariat autour des satellites Amazon Leo.

item.title: Google brings its Gemini Personal Intelligence feature to India
item.description: The feature lets users connect Google accounts like Gmail and Photos to get personalized answers

item.title: Amazon Acquires Major Satellite Operator as It Ramps Up Fight to Beat Elon Musk’s Starlink
item.description: Amazon's acquisition also inks a partnership with Apple.

item.title: Adobe fixes PDF zero-day security bug that hackers have exploited for months
item.description: It's not clear how many people were compromised by this hacking campaign, but a security researcher said the hackers were targeting victims since at least November 2025.

item.title: Demand for used PS5s is up more than 93% thanks to recent price hike — here's what to look for when buying second hand
item.description: Demand for used PS5s is spiking, here's what to know when buying second hand.

item.title: 'This wasn’t just phishing — it was a full-service cybercrime platform': FBI reveals takedown of notorious W3LL phishing operation targeting thousands of victims
item.description: W3LL phishing operation targeted victims worldwide before being shut down.

item.title: Boulanger fait perdre 30 % sur cette sonnette connectée qui se recharge à l’énergie solaire
item.description: Grâce à ses deux capteurs de 1 080p et sa vision nocturne en couleur, l'Ezviz EP3X assure la protection de votre domicile 24h/24. Les images sont consultables à tout moment grâce aux 32 Go de stockage et à l'application mobile. Le tout est actuellement disponible à 109,99 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: Tesla adds ‘streaks,’ other stats to track how often drivers use Full Self-Driving software
item.description: Tesla has also made it easy to subscribe to the advanced driver assistance system.

item.title: Sony may launch three PS6 devices in 2027, including a budget and main console and a handheld device all ranging between '$350' and '$1000', leaker claims
item.description: A leaker has claimed Sony will launch its next-generation PlayStation with three devices, including two consoles and a handheld.

item.title: Google Search tackles sites that try to stop you from leaving when you hit the back button
item.description: Websites that act like a super-chatty colleague who just won't shut up and let you go when a conversation should be over are among the most annoying things on the internet. Google is now doing something about that scourge.Picture the scene: you look up something on Google Search and — instead of relying on potentially hallucinating AI Overviews — you click through to an actual website for your information. But, when you try to leave the site by hitting the back button, your browser doesn’t immediately take you back to the previous webpage. Instead, the website first displays an "oh, while you'...

item.title: Un robot humanoïde à moins de 5 000 euros sur AliExpress : la Chine casse les prix
item.description: Le fabricant chinois Unitree vient de mettre en vente son robot humanoïde R1 sur AliExpress, à partir de 5 900 dollars. Une première mondiale sur une plateforme grand public qui marque un tournant pour un marché jusqu'ici réservé aux laboratoires.

item.title: The coolest home office gadgets in Walmart's massive Flash Sale — I found the most useful tech deals from mouse jigglers to portable monitors
item.description: From office essentials to cool gear you didn't even realize you needed for a productivity boost.

item.title: A Fresh Scar on the Moon: Newly Discovered Crater Reveals Recent Impact
item.description: A space rock smashed into the lunar surface in late spring 2024.

item.title: Instacart acquires Instaleap to expand its enterprise platform internationally
item.description: The acquisition will allow the company to expand its business into international markets without needing to launch a delivery network in those regions.

item.title: From cloud to Agentic AI: Why security must evolve faster than innovation
item.description: Most organizations did not fail at cloud security because they misunderstood the technology, rather they failed because they tried to secure it afterwards.

item.title: How vibe coding app Anything is rebuilding after getting booted from the App Store twice
item.description: Anything is planning to launch a desktop companion app to aid mobile app development after its App Store removal.

item.title: Votre Pixel 10 devient plus sécurisé, mais vous ne le verrez pas
item.description: Une mise à jour totalement invisible pour les utilisateurs vient renforcer la sécurité des smartphones Pixel 10 de Google. Voici de quoi il s'agit.

item.title: Viral Video Offers Compelling New Strategy for Defending Kids From 30-50 Feral Hogs: Bipedal Robots
item.description: But is this a legit answer to the legit question Americans have been chewing on since 2019?

item.title: Quick! Keeper password manager cuts 50% off Personal and Family plans and 30% off Business Starter plans – tighten your account security with a discount on our pick of one of the best password managers in 2026
item.description: There is currently a limited-time deal across Keeper Family, Personal, and Business Starter plans.

item.title: Lucid sells more robotaxis to Uber, appoints a new CEO
item.description: Lucid is making some changes. The luxury EV company said Tuesday that it was expanding its robotaxi deal with Uber - and nabbing some additional investment cash in the process. And it's naming a new CEO who hails not from the world of electric vehicles, but from a company that manufactures a different kind of […]

item.title: « Nous sommes profondément préoccupés » : pourquoi 1 000 stars d’Hollywood refusent la fusion entre Paramount et Warner Bros
item.description: Dans une lettre ouverte, plus de 1 000 grands noms du cinéma américain font part de leur inquiétude concernant le rachat de Warner Bros par Paramount.

item.title: Un clone virtuel pour le patron : Meta développe une IA de Mark Zuckerberg pour ses employés
item.description: Si vous travaillez chez Meta et que le grand patron est injoignable, pas de panique : vous pourrez bientôt discuter avec son double numérique. L'entreprise développe actuellement une version IA photoréaliste de Mark Zuckerberg, conçue pour interagir avec les 79 000 employés du groupe à travers le monde.

item.title: OpenAI buys its second startup in a month
item.description: OpenAI has acquired Hiro Finance, a startup that offers AI-powered financial planning tools. As first reported by TechCrunch, fiscal terms of the deal, which was announced on Monday, were not disclosed by OpenAI. However, all signs point this to being an acquhire, with Hiro founder Ethan Bloch writing on LinkedIn that the company's product would stop working on April 20. Users have until May 13 to migrate their data off of Hiro's servers before everything is deleted. It's unclear if OpenAI plans to offer a dedicated financial planning tool in the mold of Hiro. At the start of the year, the co...

item.title: Jusqu’à 42 kWh de stockage : Anker sort l’arme fatale pour une maison 100 % autonome : la Solarbank Max AC
item.description: À travers sa filiale Anker Solix, l’entreprise Anker continue d’étoffer son écosystème de batteries solaires. Dernier produit en date : la batterie solaire Solarbank Max AC, un système pensé surtout pour les foyers déjà équipés de panneaux photovoltaïques mais dépourvus de solution de stockage.

item.title: I cannot believe the Trump Mobile T1 has gotten even uglier — and now you have more reasons not to buy it
item.description: Trump Mobile's T1 phone has missed another ship deadline, and now it's a completely different phone

item.title: The First Trailer For ‘Insidious: Out of the Further’ Is a Jumpscare Nightmare
item.description: Sweet dreams are definitely not made of these.

item.title: Sony just dropped a first look-trailer for Insidious: Out of the Further — but I’m worried it’s spoiled the sequel’s best scares
item.description: Insidious: Out of the Further has a first trailer, but those wanting to avoid spoilers should probably avoid it.

item.title: I tested the Bambu Lab X2D, and this dual-nozzle FDM 3D printer delivers exceptional print quality, material compatibility, and all at a superb price
item.description: Following an icon of the 3D print world was never going to be easy, but the X2D impresses from the outset with its dual-nozzle tool head and mix of direct drive and Bowden extrusion.

item.title: What good AI in government actually looks like
item.description: By deploying frontier models to help communities access federal money, a new tool is showing how to build AI in the public interest. Last spring, when employees from Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency arrived at the National Endowment for the Humanities, they used ChatGPT to decide which federally funded grants to eliminate.

item.title: Bambu Lab dévoile la X2D une nouvelle référence avec un système à double extrusion
item.description: Le constructeur Bambu Lab renouvelle sa gamme X avec la nouvelle imprimante X2D. Celle-ci reprend des fonctions phares de la H2S comme la gestion thermique de la chambre d'impression, le tout à moins de 1 000 euros.

item.title: Amazon to buy Globalstar for $11.57B in bid to flesh out its satellite biz
item.description: Amazon on Tuesday agreed to buy satellite company Globalstar, known for powering Apple's "Emergency SOS" feature, for $11.57 billion in cash.

item.title: Coupe du monde 2026 : les TV Philips transforment votre salon en véritable stade de foot [Sponso]
item.description: Pour profiter pleinement du but vainqueur de Michael Olise en finale de la prochaine Coupe du monde de football (vers la 79e minute) et célébrer comme il se doit la troisième étoile de la France, faites confiance aux téléviseurs Philips Ambilight.

item.title: Has Google’s AI watermarking system been reverse-engineered?
item.description: A software developer claims to have reverse-engineered Google DeepMind's SynthID system, showing how AI watermarks can be stripped from generated images or manually inserted into other works. A claim that, according to Google, isn't true. The developer, going by the username Aloshdenny, has open-sourced their work on GitHub and documented his process, claiming all it […]...

item.title: ‘The days of using federal funds to further discrimination are over’: IBM to pay $17 million in first-of-its-kind ‘Civil Rights Fraud Initiative’ settlement – Trump administration anti-DEI push seeks to strip businesses of ‘inherently divisive policies’
item.description: The first settlement claim under the Civil Rights Fraud Initiative will see IBM pay $17 million to the US government.

item.title: OpenAI CEO’s attacker faces attempted murder charges after throwing a device at Sam Altman’s home
item.description: San Francisco DA Brooke Jenkins alleges 20-year-old Daniel Moreno-Gama tried to kill Altman and a security guard. The man accused of throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman’s home had written about AI’s purported risk to humanity and traveled from Texas to San Francisco intending to kill Altman, authorities said Monday.Authorities allege 20-year-old Daniel Moreno-Gama threw the incendiary device about 4 a.m. Friday, setting an exterior gate at Altman’s home alight before fleeing on foot, police said. Less than an hour later, Moreno-Gama allegedly went to OpenAI’s headquarters abou...

item.title: Valve’s Steam Controller launch looks imminent based on new public records — and it might finally give me the perfect excuse to build a custom Steam Machine
item.description: Valve may not be ready to launch the Steam Machine just yet, but there's more positive news on its main accessory.

item.title: Google Meet débarque sur Android Auto, mais il y a un (gros) hic
item.description: Participer à une réunion Google Meet depuis l'écran de son voiture, c'est maintenant possible sur Android Auto. Mais entre les profils pros non supportés, l'absence d'écran d'attente et la question de la sécurité au volant, tout n'est est pas si simple.

item.title: Scientists Generated Solar Power After Dark, Thanks to a Trick Using Wood
item.description: In a new experiment, reengineered balsa wood stored sunlight as heat.

item.title: Anbernic’s new handheld is a pocket-friendly Android device with a swiveling screen
item.description: Anbernic, one of the most prolific makers of handheld consoles and emulators, isn't afraid to experiment with creative designs. After debuting a wireless controller with a heart rate monitor earlier this year, the company has announced a new gaming device with a square design, basic controls, and a swiveling touchscreen. What's not so creative is […]...

item.title: Ces écouteurs ouverts signés JBL, parfaits pour les sportifs, sont bradés à -30 % sur Amazon
item.description: Les JBL Sense Pro sont des écouteurs qui mêlent autonomie, design confortable, et un micro solide grâce à l'ajout de l'IA pour un prix de 120,24 euros au lieu de 179,99 euros grâce à Amazon.

item.title: Ben McKenzie vs. crypto
item.description: A few years ago, during the absolute peak of the cryptocurrency craze, a somewhat surprising skeptic emerged. Most people know Ben McKenzie from his acting work on Southland or Gotham, or would recognize him instantly as Ryan Atwood from The O.C. While seemingly everyone else was buying Bitcoin, McKenzie decided to figure out what Bitcoin […]

item.title: Samsung is hiking the prices of its Galaxy phones and tablets
item.description: Samsung is raising prices across Galaxy Z Flip 7, Galaxy S25 FE, and Galaxy S25 Edge phones, as spotted earlier by Phone Arena. Though the base model of each phone is staying at the same price, devices with higher storage are now up to $80 more expensive: Last week, Samsung also increased the price of […]

item.title: Apple and Amazon are teaming up to challenge Starlink’s smartphone ambitions
item.description: Amazon has made a deal to buy Globalstar's low-Earth orbit satellite network for $11.57 billion, snapping up its spectrum licenses, operations, and assets to combine with its upcoming Leo internet satellite constellation. Apple owned 20 percent of Globalstar, and as a part of the deal, Amazon will continue to support satellite services like Emergency SOS […]...

item.title: Microsoft wants to build its own, more secure version of OpenClaw for Copilot
item.description: New reports suggest Microsoft is working on its own agentic AI that could be so proactive, it replaces humans.

item.title: Voici la liste des Tesla compatibles avec le nouveau FSD qui arrive en Europe
item.description: Tesla vient de démarrer le déploiement de sa fonction la plus révolutionnaire, le FSD (ou Conduite entièrement automatique supervisée en français) en Europe, en démarrant par les Pays-Bas. Le problème, c'est que les Tesla les plus anciennes ne sont pas compatibles pour le moment. On fait le point.
